image.title: NAPT Lin, TY Ni, TY Chen, CP Su, HF Sun, MK Chen, CC Chou, PY Wang, YR Lin

item.title: Reducing the consumption of personal protective equipment by setting up a multifunctional sampling station in the emergency department to screen for COVID-19 infection in Taiwan.
